results.title: Three Essex post office branches to close by the end of the year
results.description: Three Post Office branches in Grays, Chelmsford and Rochford are set to close before the end of the year, among a wave of Morrisons closures.

results.title: Uzbekistan Nominal GDP Per Capita Reaches US$3,879
results.description: Nominal GDP per capita in Uzbekistan reached US$3,879 in 2025, an increase of US$614 from the prior year, driven by nominal economic growth and a stronger soum.

results.title: Peruvian Metals Production Update for the First Half of 2026 at Aguila Norte Processing Plant
results.description: Edmonton, Alberta--(Newsfile Corp. - July 9, 2026) - Peruvian Metals Corp. (TSXV: PER) (OTC Pink: DUVNF) ("Peruvian Metals" or the "Company") is pleased to provide an update regarding the mineral processing at its 80-per-cent-owned fully permitted Aguila Norte processing plant ("Aguila Norte" or the "Plant") located in Northern Peru. During the first six months of 2026 the Plant was at full capacity and processed 18,269 tonnes of third-party mineral, compared with 18,500 tonnes

results.title: Chanel acquires world’s oldest shirtmaker Charvet
results.description: The purchase stems from a collaboration between the company and artistic director Matthieu Blazy for his debut collection with the French fashion house.
